name: Desecration
short_description: Who have you become? All that matters is that you keep your "brother" fed. In this narrative Horror Game drag your newest victim through the subterranean cavity where your brother now resides, but tread lightly as you explore. The flesh of victims' past claws out from the walls for retribution.
detailed_description:
Explore the underground tunnels... Where the "Rot" resides.

Wander the underground tunnels that were dug decades ago to recover your memories.

Why are you here?

Gareth Zeal is a broken man.

After over a decade of no contact with his estranged brother Gawain, he suddenly receives a voicemail asking for help.

“Heard you were asking around town about me. I’m alive. Living in the rum tunnels at Grandfather’s old property. Camped out in the speakeasy. Had to board off the church, been hearing…things. I need your help brother…please. For once.”

However upon Gareth’s arrival, he finds that his brother has merged with a horrific rot entity that feeds on memories. It’s spreading through the ground, and Gawain is the origin point.

Hungry and losing his strength, Gawain begs Gareth to feed him the only food that the rot allows him – Corpses.

Drag your newest Victim

In order to feed your brother, drag a coffin across the tunnels to implement into a device that creates Gawain's food.

Find VHS Tapes to Recover your Past

Gareth has a bad memory, find VHS tapes throughout the tunnels to recover footage from the past.

Be wary of the Retribution towards your Sins...

In order to save his brother, Gareth has done many unforgivable things. Be prepared to run as your victims will seek for retribution once they escape their confines. 

Features:

  • A 60-90 Minute Narrative Experience

  • Playable VHS Tapes for Lore and Puzzles

  • Interactable NPCs

  • "Push-Cart" Styled Coffin Dragging

  • Original 3D Art Inspired by PS1 Graphics
